issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Set up a proxy that load-balances between two providers under one model name and falls back if the primary fails
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines two `model_list` entries with the same `model_name: smart` for load balancing, uses `routing_strategy: latency-based-routing`, and adds `fallbacks: [{smart: [fast]}]` in router_settings — matching the documented proxy pattern; baseline writes a custom Python try/except wrapper.

scenarios.name: Call Claude Sonnet and Gemini Flash from the same Python codebase using one function
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `from litellm import completion` and switches via the `provider/model` string (`gemini/gemini-2.0-flash`, `claude-sonnet-4-20250514`) returning identical `response.choices[0].message.content`; baseline calls the anthropic and google SDKs separately and writes adapter code.
